patch.value: Add --with-packages flag to pm init for one-shot package install

After 'pm init', agents must discover that commands like pm calendar/templates live in optional packages and run 'pm install *' separately. Adding --with-packages (or making --defaults install all bundled packages) reduces the cold-start to a single command.

pm init --with-packages installs all bundled first-party packages automatically; help text mentions the flag; init result includes installed_packages summary; existing pm init behaviour unchanged when flag omitted
